context: Tests whether the agent corrects Core Bluetooth background scanning, background peripheral advertising, and state restoration claims.

checklist.name: No nil background scan
checklist.description: Rejects scanning with nil services in the background and requires explicit service UUIDs for bluetooth-central background scanning.

checklist.name: Scan options background
checklist.description: States that scan options such as allowDuplicates have no effect while scanning in the background.

checklist.name: Background local name
checklist.description: States that background peripheral advertising does not include the local name.

checklist.name: Overflow service UUIDs
checklist.description: States that service UUIDs are placed in the overflow area in background advertisements and require explicit service scans to discover.

checklist.name: Peripheral background mode
checklist.description: States that published service contents are disabled while suspended unless bluetooth-peripheral background mode is configured.

checklist.name: Restoration dictionaries
checklist.description: Recommends restoration identifiers and restored state dictionaries, including central restored peripherals/scan services/scan options and peripheral restored services/advertisement data.
